Function: SelectPalette
Address: 0x4601E8


HPALETTE SelectPalette(HDC hdc,HPALETTE hPal,BOOL bForceBkgd)

{

// WARNING: Could not recover jumptable at 0x004601e8. Too many branches
// WARNING: Treating indirect jump as call

}
